name: Beaumonde Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 2 lb loaves caraway rye bread (Round type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top off of one loaf of bread and dig out the center in bite-sized pieces, leaving the shell of crust as a bowl.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients in the bowl.
3. Fill the crust with the mixture.
4. Tear up the second loaf into bite-sized pieces.
